text:
Moves for Heavy :D
Heavy N-B Minigun: shoots bullets that does 1% per bullet. you can aim up or down, has heating so you can use it only for like 4 seconds.
F-B Charge: charges forward for little while, when it hits the target, Heavy slams him with his minigun dealing strong knockback.
U-B Fairy: takes on his fairy halloween suit and starts flying upwards, deals no damage. (this was really difficult)
D-B Sandvich: bites sandvich once and heals 15% damage leaves you open for 1.5 seconds. slows down falling time.
Final Smash: RATATATATATATA: starts shooting stronger bullets for 4 seconds, into much more wider area than in his N-B but bullets does 3% damage per hit :D
